title: Periyar University Controller of Examinations Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
short_info: Periyar University Controller of Examinations Notification 2026 has been released on 29 May 2026 on the official website www.periyaruniversity.ac.in.Has been announced through the Controller of Examinations Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 50 years Maximum Age: 57 years

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree with at least 55% of the marks
qualification.details: Master's Degree with at least 55% of the marks or an equivalent grade in a point scale wherever grading system is followed. An academician not lower in rank than that of a Professor of a College / University or at least 15 years of experience as Assistant Professor in the Academic Level 11 and above or with 8 years of service in the Academic Level 12 and above including as Associate Professor along with experience in educational administration or Comparable experience in research establishment and/or other Institutions of higher education. OR 15 years of administrative experience, of which 8 years shall be as Deputy Registrar or an equivalent post. Knowledge in Tamil to the extent of carrying out official correspondences and drafting reports.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.periyaruniversity.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 29-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Periyar University Controller of Examinations post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Controller of Examinations post at Periyar University is 29th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Controller of Examinations position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's Degree with at least 55% marks. Additionally, they need to have significant academic or administrative experience, such as being a Professor or having at least 15 years of experience as an Assistant Professor or equivalent administrative roles.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Controller of Examinations post is between 50 years and 57 years. Specific age relaxation rules may apply as per government guidelines, which are detailed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the Controller of Examinations job at Periyar University?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form from the official website, fill it out carefully, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address specified in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Controller of Examinations role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Controller of Examinations position will receive a salary in the pay scale of Rs. 144200 to Rs. 218200 per month, corresponding to Level 14.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the Periyar University recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee. General and OBC category candidates need to pay Rs. 2000/-, while SC/ST candidates are required to pay Rs. 1000/-.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Controller of Examinations post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Controller of Examinations post at Periyar University primarily involves an Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience for the interview round.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: Periyar University has announced a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Controller of Examinations in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of Periyar University?
faq.answer: The official website of Periyar University is www.periyaruniversity.ac.in. Candidates can visit this website to download the application form and find more details about the recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. Does the recruitment mention any requirement for knowledge of the Tamil language?
faq.answer: Yes, the eligibility criteria state that candidates must have knowledge in Tamil to the extent of carrying out official correspondences and drafting reports, indicating its importance for the role.
